note: Public-safe subset of Hlido reviews. Methodology weights, raw evidence, and internals are private.

items.name: Naoma AI Demo Agent
items.summary: Real customer-journey review completed and published with a final verdict.

items.name: WorkBeaver
items.summary: WorkBeaver's demonstration-based task learning lowers the bar for non-technical automation users. Free beta live with no login. Laddoo 63.4/100 FADING â€” editorial-only score, T1 engine run deferred.

items.name: Gumloop
items.summary: Gumloop is a no-code AI workflow builder with a Free tier (5k credits/month), tiered Pro plan starting at $37/mo, and integrations spanning Slack, Google, and more. Public surfaces audited 2026-04-26.

items.name: Aider
items.summary: Aider 0.86.2 — open-source AI pair-programming CLI. Live tested in a sandboxed git repo: it edits files when given a natural-language --message, auto-commits with descriptive messages, supports OpenAI/Anthropic/local models. MIT licensed.

items.name: agentmail
items.summary: {"strategic_alpha":{"predicted":75,"reasoning":"Real infrastructure gap — agents need email and no prior solution was agent-native. $6M seed + YC validates market. MCP server shows framework-thinking. Differentiated from generic SMTP tools."},"execution_grit":{"predicted":70,"reasoning":"Public API docs, free tier testable without enterprise gate, real-time events verifiable via webhook test. SOC

items.name: Chatbot Arena (LMArena)
items.summary: Public side-by-side LLM comparison platform. Type a prompt, get two anonymous model answers, vote which is better. Used as the de facto LLM leaderboard.

items.name: Perplexity
items.summary: AI-powered answer engine with cited sources. Public no-login basic queries. Pro tier for advanced reasoning models.

items.name: happycapy
items.summary: {"strategic_alpha":{"predicted":65,"reasoning":"Compelling framing — browser-native agent computer removes setup friction. Trickle team credibility + 926 PH upvotes + runner-up AI Product of Year suggests real execution. But crowded sandbox market."},"execution_grit":{"predicted":35,"reasoning":"Login required for all meaningful functionality. Free tier limited Claude Code access makes core claims
